MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Continued To Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions; Supporting Declaration In Support Thereof; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Centurion Capital Corporation's motion to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on November 7, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
